mnemonics: ETHEREAL GOLD: ETH is the main Ethereum currency (like gold), while ETC is the 'Ethereum Classic' that split after the DAO hack and is seen as more traditional/classic
keyPoints: ETH is the native cryptocurrency of the Ethereum blockchain used for gas fees and transactions
ETC (Ethereum Classic) is the original chain that continued after the 2016 DAO hack hard fork
The key difference is philosophical: ETH prioritized restitution after the hack while ETC maintained immutability
commonMistakes: Confusing ETH (Ethereum) with ETC (Ethereum Classic) and thinking they're the same
Assuming both chains have identical features and smart contract compatibility
Forgetting that ETC uses a different mining algorithm (ETCHash) than ETH originally used (Ethash)
